subcodes.first_line: O Abbas, King of men! On this day, with utmost joy and gladness, He maketh mention of the companions of the Divine Court. They are seven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عباس ملیک ناس امروز با کمال فرح و نشاط ذکر اهل بساط مینماید ایشان هفت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
